stemHtml: What is meant by the term "no significant cloud" in a TAF or METAR report?

options.a: There are no clouds at or below 5000 ft.
options.b: There are no CB or TCU clouds only at or below 5000 ft.
options.c: There are no clouds at or below 6000 ft.
options.d: There are no CB or TCU clouds only at or below 6000 ft.
